docs.title: About linkml-test
docs.text: This is the project description

docs.title: MIAPPE 1.2 Gold Layer - Weston Poplar GWAS Phenotyping Experiment
docs.text:
Cleaned, conformed, one-class-per-table model of a MIAPPE 1.2 plant phenotyping dataset: Populus trichocarpa observed at ORNL between 2024-03-26 and 2024-05-09. Facts are de-duplicated and carry deterministic md5 surrogate keys, so a reload reproduces identical identifiers.

URI: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold

Name: miappe-gold

docs.title: Classes
docs.text: Class Description BiologicalMaterial The genotype or accession an observation unit is grown from DataFile A source file the study was loaded from Environment A study-wide environment parameter, stored as a name/value pair Event A dated event applied to the study, e Image One image-pipeline artifact: a raw frame, mask, header or analysis output Investigation Top-level research context Observation A single measured value ObservationUnit The thing observed - here an individual plant ObservedVariable A measured variable: trait + method + scale Person A contact on the study Sample Tissue taken from an observation unit on a date (leaf, stem, whole plant) Study One experiment at one site over one date range

docs.title: Slots
docs.text: Slot Description anatomicalEntity associatedPublication biologicalMaterialAltitude biologicalMaterialCoordUncertainty biologicalMaterialExtId biologicalMaterialId biologicalMaterialLatitude Latitude of the wild collection site, not the growth site biologicalMaterialLongitude biologicalMaterialPreprocessing collectionDate contactInst culturalPractice dataFileDesc dataFileLink dataFileVersion developmentStage envParam envParamValue eventAccNumber eventDate eventDesc eventId eventType expeDesignDesc expeDesignMap expeDesignType externalId filePath fileType Artifact kind within a modality, e genus growthFacilityDesc growthFacilityType imageId infraspecificName investigationDescription investigationId investigationTitle license locationAltitude locationCountry locationLatitude locationLongitude materialSourceAccName materialSourceAccNumber materialSourceAltitude materialSourceCoordUncertainty materialSourceDesc materialSourceDoi materialSourceId materialSourceInstCode materialSourceInstName materialSourceLatitude materialSourceLongitude materialSourceOtherIds methodAccNumber methodDesc methodName methodRef miappeVersion Modality Sensor that produced the artifact: FC1, FC2, VNIR, SWIR, MSC1, IR1, RGB1, RGB... notes observationId observationTimestamp A true timestamp, unlike the string form used by Image observationValue The measured value obsUnitDesc obsUnitFactorValue obsUnitId obsUnitLevelHierarchy obsUnitType organism personAffiliation personEmail personId personName personRole publicReleaseDate qualityFlag replicate sampleDesc sampleId Encodes its own lineage: SAMPLE---<L scaleAccNumber scaleName The unit, as free text: mm, g, cm2, umol m-2 s-1 siteName spatialDistribution species studyDescription studyEndDate studyId studyStartDate studyTitle submissionDate timeScale traitAccNumber traitCharacteristic traitCharacteristicAccessionNumber traitEntity traitEntityAccessionNumber traitName variableAccNumber variableId variableName

docs.title: Types
docs.text: Type Description Boolean A binary (true or false) value Curie a compact URI Date a date (year, month and day) in an idealized calendar DateOrDatetime Either a date or a datetime Datetime The combination of a date and time Decimal A real number with arbitrary precision that conforms to the xsd:decimal speci... Double A real number that conforms to the xsd:double specification Float A real number that conforms to the xsd:float specification Integer An integer Jsonpath A string encoding a JSON Path Jsonpointer A string encoding a JSON Pointer Ncname Prefix part of CURIE Nodeidentifier A URI, CURIE or BNODE that represents a node in a model Objectidentifier A URI or CURIE that represents an object in the model Sparqlpath A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path String A character string Time A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular... Uri a complete URI Uriorcurie a URI or a CURIE

docs.title: Class: Image
docs.text: One image-pipeline artifact: a raw frame, mask, header or analysis output. imageId is a surrogate: md5 of all business columns.

docs.title: Induced
docs.text:
name: Image
annotations:
  parquet_file:
    tag: parquet_file
    value: Images.parquet
  rows_in_current_data:
    tag: rows_in_current_data
    value: 552674
description: 'One image-pipeline artifact: a raw frame, mask, header or analysis output.
  imageId is a surrogate: md5 of all business columns.'
from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
attributes:
  imageId:
    name: imageId
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    identifier: true
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Image
    range: string
    required: true
  studyId:
    name: studyId
    description: Denormalised for filtering - also derivable via obsUnitId.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Study
    - Person
    - Environment
    - DataFile
    - Event
    - BiologicalMaterial
    - ObservationUnit
    - ObservedVariable
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: Study
    required: true
  obsUnitId:
    name: obsUnitId
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Event
    - ObservationUnit
    - Sample
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: ObservationUnit
    required: true
  sampleId:
    name: sampleId
    comments:
    - Entirely null across all 552674 rows; Parquet defaulted the type to string.
      A MIAPPE slot this study never filled.
    - Named like a foreign key but never populated and not covered by a schema.yml
      relationship test, so it is left as a plain scalar here.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Sample
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: string
  observationTimestamp:
    name: observationTimestamp
    description: Stored as a US-format string, e.g. '4/15/24 6:55'. Not the timestamp
      type Observation uses - normalise before joining the two on time.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: string
  Modality:
    name: Modality
    description: 'Sensor that produced the artifact: FC1, FC2, VNIR, SWIR, MSC1, IR1,
      RGB1, RGB2, S3D. Capitalised to match the Parquet column.'
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Image
    range: string
  fileType:
    name: fileType
    description: Artifact kind within a modality, e.g. Image, Mask, Analysis, Protocol,
      Image Data Header.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Image
    range: string
  filePath:
    name: filePath
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Image
    range: string
  notes:
    name: notes
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Image
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: string

docs.title: Jsonpath
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Jsonpath

A string encoding a JSON Path. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.

docs.title: Jsonpointer
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Jsonpointer

A string encoding a JSON Pointer. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to a valid object within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.

    tag: rows_in_current_data

description: 'A single measured value. observationId is a surrogate: md5(obsUnitId,
  variableId, observationTimestamp).'
from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
attributes:
  observationId:
    name: observationId
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    identifier: true
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: string
    required: true
  studyId:
    name: studyId
    description: Denormalised for filtering - also derivable via obsUnitId.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Study
    - Person
    - Environment
    - DataFile
    - Event
    - BiologicalMaterial
    - ObservationUnit
    - ObservedVariable
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: Study
    required: true
  obsUnitId:
    name: obsUnitId
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Event
    - ObservationUnit
    - Sample
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: ObservationUnit
    required: true
  sampleId:
    name: sampleId
    description: Set only for point-measurement traits that need the tissue; null
      when the trait is measured on the whole plant.
    comments:
    - Null in 416409 of 420858 rows (98.9%).
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Sample
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: Sample
  observationTimestamp:
    name: observationTimestamp
    description: A true timestamp, unlike the string form used by Image.observationTimestamp.
    comments:
    - Timezone-naive in Parquet (timestamp[ns], tz=None). xsd:dateTime and JSON Schema
      date-time both want an RFC3339 offset, so an exporter has to assign one explicitly
      - the zone is genuinely absent from the data, do not silently assume UTC.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: datetime
  variableId:
    name: variableId
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - ObservedVariable
    - Observation
    range: ObservedVariable
    required: true
  observationValue:
    name: observationValue
    description: The measured value. Its unit is Observed_variable.scaleName, not
      stored here.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: double
  replicate:
    name: replicate
    comments:
    - Entirely null across all 420858 rows; Parquet defaulted the type to string.
      A MIAPPE slot this study never filled.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: string
  qualityFlag:
    name: qualityFlag
    comments:
    - Entirely null across all 420858 rows; Parquet defaulted the type to string.
      A MIAPPE slot this study never filled.
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    range: string
  notes:
    name: notes
    from_schema: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold
    rank: 1000
    owner: Observation
    domain_of:
    - Observation
    - Image
    range: string

docs.title: Sparqlpath
docs.text:
search: boost: 1.0 ---# Type: Sparqlpath

A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path. The value of the string MUST conform to SPARQL syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded as RDF.

docs.title: Slot: biologicalMaterialLatitude
docs.text: Latitude of the wild collection site, not the growth site.

docs.title: Slot: fileType
docs.text: Artifact kind within a modality, e.g. Image, Mask, Analysis, Protocol, Image Data Header.

docs.title: miappe-gold
docs.text:
Cleaned, conformed, one-class-per-table model of a MIAPPE 1.2 plant phenotyping dataset: Populus trichocarpa observed at ORNL between 2024-03-26 and 2024-05-09. Facts are de-duplicated and carry deterministic md5 surrogate keys, so a reload reproduces identical identifiers.

URI: https://w3id.org/ornl/miappe-gold

docs.title: Slot: observationValue
docs.text: The measured value. Its unit is Observed_variable.scaleName, not stored here.

docs.title: Slot: scaleName
docs.text: The unit, as free text: mm, g, cm2, umol m-2 s-1.
